name: Applejack Apples
recipeInstructions:
Use Calvados, a French apple brandy, or regular brandy if preferred. Red wine may also be used with excellent results.
1. Arrange the apple slices in a glass baking dish. Sprinkle with lemon juice and Applejack or your choice of brandies or wine. Dot with the butter.
2. Add enough apple cider to fill the dish to depth of 1 inch.
3. Bake in a preheated 375-degree oven for 20 minutes.
